title: transaction — settings
description: Tenant-facing transaction + ledger configuration. Two groups: `transaction` for tenant-wide ledger config (base currency, enabled accounts, reconciliation schedule, alerts routing) + `transaction_user` for per-user preferences (monthly-report subscription, imbalance-alert opt-in).

groups.label: Ledger + transactions
groups.description: Tenant-wide configuration for the money-movement ledger. Regulator-critical — changes to base_currency + enabled_accounts + threshold configs write audit rows with 7-year retention.

sections.label: Base currency + multi-currency
sections.description: The tenant's base currency + multi-currency policy. base_currency is set at provisioning + should rarely change — every historical transaction is measured against the base at commit time.

fields.name: base_currency
fields.label: Tenant base currency
fields.helpText: Every transaction is reported in this currency (via base_amount_cents on cross-currency transactions). Changing this AFTER historical transactions exist is a regulator-critical event — writes an audit row + notifies finance role + requires admin approval.

sections.label: Enabled accounts
sections.description: Chart-of-accounts entries active for the tenant. Disabling an account refuses new ledger entries against it (existing entries stay).

fields.name: enabled_accounts
fields.label: Enabled ledger accounts
fields.helpText: Disabling an account after use will preserve historical ledger entries but refuse new writes against it. Regulator audit trail preserved.

sections.label: Account balance thresholds
sections.description: Watermark thresholds that fire AccountBalanceThresholdCrossed alerts. Cents.

fields.name: high_watermark_accounts_receivable_cents
fields.label: Accounts receivable high watermark (cents)
fields.helpText: Alert fires when accounts_receivable balance exceeds this value. $50,000 default.

fields.name: low_watermark_cash_cents
fields.label: Cash low watermark (cents)
fields.helpText: Alert fires when cash balance falls below this value. $1,000 default.

sections.label: Notifications routing
sections.description: Where imbalance + threshold + amendment alerts are delivered.

fields.name: imbalance_notify_users
fields.label: Notify these users on ledger imbalance
fields.helpText: Every user listed receives LedgerImbalanceDetectedNotification. Tenant owners + admins are always notified regardless.

fields.name: amendment_notify_users
fields.label: Notify these users on ledger amendments

fields.name: threshold_notify_users
fields.label: Notify these users on account balance thresholds

groups.label: My ledger preferences
groups.description: Per-user preferences for the ledger surface.

fields.name: receive_monthly_ledger_report
fields.label: Send me the monthly General Ledger report

fields.name: receive_imbalance_alerts
fields.label: Notify me on ledger imbalances
fields.helpText: This preference only takes effect if the tenant admin listed you in imbalance_notify_users. Owners + admins always receive.

fields.name: receive_threshold_alerts
fields.label: Notify me on account balance thresholds
